cells.p:
Picks which
sensor to open.
Which direction
to look.
Which question
to test.

slides.label: loop
slides.headline:
The agent closes
its own
feedback loop.
slides.sub:
Same equation.
New variable —
the action that
changes what
the sensors report.

slides.label: consequence
slides.headline:
The world is no
longer a passive
stream.

slides.label: curiosity
slides.headline:
The epistemic term
rewards actions
that reduce future
uncertainty.
